PICKLEBALL IN THE CLOUDS

Fastest growing sport on the planet 🎾
EASY TO LEARN. SERIOUSLY FUN. ADDICTIVE.
Join us in Huycho

What is pickleball?

Combines the fun of tennis, ping pong, badminton, and paddle sports. Played on a smaller court that's easy on your body. You'll learn the basics in minutes, have a blast with friends old and new, and stay active while laughing the whole time. Perfect for all ages and fitness levels.

Equipment

Nets, paddles & balls

Beginners welcome
